use.tlua(2,7): error TS2339: Property 'tag' does not exist on type '{}'.


==== decl.tlua (0 errors) ====
    declare global {
      interface Shape {
        x: number;
      }
    }
    
==== use.tlua (1 errors) ====
    Shape = {};
    Shape.tag = 1;
          ~~~
!!! error TS2339: Property 'tag' does not exist on type '{}'.
    local s: Shape = { x = 1 };
